metadata.description: AI image generation for Claude Code — prefers AI Studio free tier, falls back to Vertex AI on quota. Supports Nano Banana, Imagen 4, and OpenAI gpt-image-1.

plugins.name: ai-image
plugins.description: Image generation skill that wraps the `ai-image` CLI. Prefers AI Studio free tier (GEMINI_API_KEY) and falls back to Vertex AI on quota/rate-limit errors. Requires the CLI to be installed separately (see README).
